subject: New Opening: Backend Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Shopgrid (e-commerce) is looking for a senior Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 18 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• Kubernetes

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Alicia Strand
Talent Scout
ByteForce
Tel: +46 70 788 90 12
